title: Structured Outputs
summary: Guide to generating schema-constrained JSON with the Responses API and strict structured outputs.
raw:
Structured Outputs

Structured outputs help you force model responses to match a JSON schema so downstream code can parse results safely.

Use strict schemas with the Responses API when you need predictable keys, validated types, and machine-readable output.

When to use it

Choose this pattern for extraction pipelines, typed assistants, or any workflow that must reject malformed JSON.

{"type":"object","properties":{"answer":{"type":"string"}},"required":["answer"]}

Combine schema validation with application checks to keep tool calls and final answers consistent.
